source_title: CaP-X: A Framework for Benchmarking and Improving Coding Agents for Robot Manipulation

ai_summary.one_liner: Open-access framework for systematically benchmarking and improving Code-as-Policy agents in robot manipulation
ai_summary.problem: Code-as-Policy effectiveness as autonomous controllers for manipulation is underexplored; performance degrades when human-crafted abstractions are removed
ai_summary.solution: CaP-Gym environment + CaP-Bench benchmark across abstraction/interaction axes + CaP-Agent0 (training-free agentic framework) + CaP-RL (RL with verifiable rewards)
ai_summary.key_result: CaP-Agent0 matches human expert on 4/7 tasks training-free; CaP-RL improves Cube Stack from 4% to 44% in sim and 12% to 76% in real
limitations: Multi-model ensemble has high inference cost

figures.caption: Figure 1: (Top) CaP-Bench Task Success Rate over Model Release Date: We primarily compare 7 tasks over 12 models' task success rates resulting from model-generated code against those from human experts. We find that while (vision-) language models have achieved capabilities comparable to humans in other domains, they still trail behind human performance in generating programmatic robot control code for diverse manipulation tasks in simulation and in the real world. (Bottom): CaP-Gym integrates RoboSuite, LIBERO-PRO, and BEHAVIOR. We further present CaP-Agent0, a training-free agentic framework that recovers near human-level performance on several manipulation tasks and achieves success rates comparable to—and in some cases exceeding—those of post-trained VLAs, without any task-specific training data.
figures.caption_ko: Figure 1: (상단) CaP-Bench 태스크 성공률 vs 모델 출시 시점: 12개 모델의 코드 생성 성공률을 human expert와 비교한다. (비전-)언어 모델들이 다른 도메인에서 human-level에 도달했음에도, 로봇 조작 코드 생성에서는 여전히 human 성능에 미치지 못한다. (하단): CaP-Gym은 RoboSuite, LIBERO-PRO, BEHAVIOR를 통합한다. CaP-Agent0는 학습 없이 여러 조작 태스크에서 near human-level 성능을 회복하며, post-trained VLA와 동등하거나 상회하는 성공률을 달성한다.

figures.caption: Figure 2: (Left) An example of code generated by Gemini-3-Pro for completing the task "lift the red cube" using the high-level primitives. (Right) Code generated by Gemini-3-Pro using just low-level primitives to achieve the same functionality as a single high-level primitive.
figures.caption_ko: Figure 2: (왼쪽) Gemini-3-Pro가 high-level primitive로 "lift the red cube" 태스크를 완수하기 위해 생성한 코드 예시. (오른쪽) 동일 기능을 low-level primitive만으로 구현한 코드.

figures.caption: Figure 3: Average task success rate across open-source and closed-source models as primitive abstraction increases. As primitive abstraction increases S4 to S1 (high level primitives with full state observation), the success rate increases. This can only in part be attributed to reduced code correctness at S3-S4, see Figure 4.
figures.caption_ko: Figure 3: primitive 추상화 수준에 따른 오픈소스/클로즈드소스 모델의 평균 태스크 성공률. S4에서 S1(high-level primitive + full state observation)으로 추상화가 증가할수록 성공률이 상승한다.

figures.caption: Figure 4: Code Execution Success Rate vs primitive abstraction.
figures.caption_ko: Figure 4: primitive 추상화 수준에 따른 코드 실행 성공률.

figures.caption: Figure 5: Comparison of single-turn (S2) and multi-turn tiers (M1-M3) across models. Enabling textual feedback through multi-turn (M1) improves task success rate in most models. Direct multimodal (M2) visual grounding reduced task success rate. We find that visual differencing into text (M3) instead of direct multimodal visual input consistently improves task success rate across both close and open source models.
figures.caption_ko: Figure 5: single-turn(S2)과 multi-turn(M1-M3) 비교. 텍스트 피드백(M1)은 대부분의 모델에서 성공률을 개선한다. 직접 멀티모달 시각 입력(M2)은 성공률을 감소시키지만, visual differencing을 텍스트로 변환(M3)하면 모든 모델에서 일관되게 성공률이 향상된다.

figures.caption: Figure 6: Evaluation of Gemini-3-Pro across four tiers of the benchmark. Multi-turn with visual differencing and low-level API (M4) significantly outperforms both single-turn low-level API (S3), and more notably, single-turn high-level API (S2).
figures.caption_ko: Figure 6: Gemini-3-Pro의 4개 tier 평가. Visual differencing + low-level API의 multi-turn(M4)이 single-turn low-level API(S3)뿐 아니라 single-turn high-level API(S2)도 크게 상회한다.

figures.caption: Figure 7: CaP-Agent0. CaP-Agent0 incorporates an auto-synthesized skill library of auxiliary utility generated by coding agents during CaP-Bench, a visual differencing model (VDM) which provides a textual description of the initial scene and for each subsequent turn what changes have occurred in the scene since, and a parallel reasoning system where multiple coding agents are provided the same prompt. These coding agents then generate candidate code solutions that may solve the task and the ensemble agent must then synthesize these code generations into a final code snippet which is then executed in the Python sandbox containing the robot environment, whether that environment may be a simulator like Robosuite or on a real robot.
figures.caption_ko: Figure 7: CaP-Agent0. CaP-Bench 중 코딩 에이전트가 생성한 보조 유틸리티의 자동 합성 스킬 라이브러리, 초기 장면과 각 턴의 변화를 텍스트로 설명하는 Visual Differencing Model(VDM), 그리고 다수의 코딩 에이전트가 동일 프롬프트로 후보 코드를 생성하고 앙상블 에이전트가 최종 코드를 합성하는 병렬 추론 시스템을 통합한다.

figures.caption: Figure 8: Ablation for CaP-Agent0. (Left): Combining VDM (M4), skill library (+SL), and parallel queries (+1M: only Gemini-3-Pro, +3M: Gemini-3-Pro, GPT-5.2, and Claude Opus) significantly improves over single-turn setup with low-level API. (Right): On 4 out of 7 CaP-Bench tasks, CaP-Agent0 achieves comparable or better success rates than human expert code in a single-turn setting.
figures.caption_ko: Figure 8: CaP-Agent0 ablation. (왼쪽): VDM(M4), 스킬 라이브러리(+SL), 병렬 쿼리(+1M: Gemini-3-Pro만, +3M: Gemini-3-Pro+GPT-5.2+Claude Opus)를 결합하면 single-turn low-level API 대비 크게 향상된다. (오른쪽): 7개 CaP-Bench 태스크 중 4개에서 CaP-Agent0가 human expert 코드와 동등하거나 상회하는 성공률을 달성한다.

figures.caption: Figure 9: An example of the web UI, where users can select the task and model at the top, view the model's responses and execution details in the middle, and provide instructions at the bottom.
figures.caption_ko: Figure 9: 웹 UI 예시. 상단에서 태스크와 모델을 선택하고, 중간에서 모델 응답과 실행 상세를 확인하며, 하단에서 지시를 입력한다.

figures.caption: Figure 10: Viser visualization section of the web UI.
figures.caption_ko: Figure 10: 웹 UI의 Viser 시각화 섹션.

figures.caption: Figure 11: An example of CaP-Agent0 locating and grasping an auto pencil refill holder, where it uses Molmo2 to locate the object.
figures.caption_ko: Figure 11: CaP-Agent0가 Molmo2를 사용하여 연필심 홀더를 위치 파악하고 파지하는 예시.

figures.caption: Figure 12: Mechanical search planning and execution example. The left column shows the agent planning process and the right column shows the physical robot execution.
figures.caption_ko: Figure 12: 기계적 탐색 계획 및 실행 예시. 왼쪽은 에이전트 계획 과정, 오른쪽은 실제 로봇 실행.

figures.caption: Figure 13: Example of a Multimodal Symbolic Reasoning task, where the robot is asked to solve the problem of 59 plus 8.
figures.caption_ko: Figure 13: 멀티모달 기호 추론 태스크 예시. 로봇이 59 + 8 문제를 풀도록 요청받는다.

figures.caption: Figure 14: Example of picking up an apple. While the first attempt fails, CaP-Agent0 takes human feedback as input, adjusts the code and completes the task successfully.
figures.caption_ko: Figure 14: 사과 집기 예시. 첫 시도 실패 후 CaP-Agent0가 인간 피드백을 받아 코드를 수정하고 태스크를 성공적으로 완수한다.

figures.caption: Figure 15: Example of CaP-Agent0 stacking round objects on top of square objects to form the tallest possible stable stack.
figures.caption_ko: Figure 15: CaP-Agent0가 둥근 물체를 사각 물체 위에 쌓아 가장 높고 안정적인 스택을 만드는 예시.

figures.caption: Figure 16: Example of robot pushing the elevator button.
figures.caption_ko: Figure 16: 로봇이 엘리베이터 버튼을 누르는 예시.

figures.caption: Figure 17: Full CaP-Bench results. From top to bottom are code compilation success rates, average task reward, and average task success rate. Note that for Re-Stack, with a simple task prompt, without visual input, we do not observe model writing code to first check the initial condition and then perform the task, resulting in failures.
figures.caption_ko: Figure 17: 전체 CaP-Bench 결과. 위에서부터 코드 컴파일 성공률, 평균 태스크 보상, 평균 태스크 성공률.

figures.caption: Figure 18: Per-model breakdown of usefulness of in-context API Usage
figures.caption_ko: Figure 18: 모델별 in-context API 사용의 유용성 분석.

figures.caption: Figure 19: CaP-RL Finetuned Qwen-2.5-Coder-7B-Instruct deployed on the real task put the red cube on the green cube. Human Oracle code gets 21/25 task successes in real. Prior to reinforcement learning, we see behaviors such as grasp approaches on the green cube as the first action, rather than a more sensible approach on the red cube first.
figures.caption_ko: Figure 19: CaP-RL로 미세조정된 Qwen-2.5-Coder-7B-Instruct를 실제 로봇에서 'put the red cube on the green cube' 태스크에 배포한 결과. Pre-RL 3/25 → Post-RL 19/25 성공률. RL 전에는 초록 큐브를 먼저 잡으려는 비합리적 행동이 관찰된다.

figures.caption: Figure 20: CaP-RL Finetuned Qwen-2.5-Coder-7B-Instruct successfully deployed on similar task variants. Demonstrates that base model is still capable of instruction following.
figures.caption_ko: Figure 20: CaP-RL 미세조정 모델이 유사 태스크 변형에서도 성공적으로 배포됨. 기본 모델의 지시 따르기 능력이 유지됨을 보인다.

figures.caption: Figure 21: "Stack these as high as you can."
figures.caption_ko: Figure 21: "가능한 한 높이 쌓으세요."

figures.caption: Figure 22: "Place the blue cube on top of the yellow cube."
figures.caption_ko: Figure 22: "파란 큐브를 노란 큐브 위에 놓으세요."

figures.caption: Figure 23: CaP-Agent0 decreases average turn count compared to M4
figures.caption_ko: Figure 23: CaP-Agent0는 M4 대비 평균 턴 수를 감소시킨다.

figures.caption: Figure 24: Distribution of multi-turn cube stack successes over turns. Results are averaged across M1, M2, and M3.
figures.caption_ko: Figure 24: multi-turn cube stack 성공의 턴별 분포. M1, M2, M3 평균.

figures.caption: Figure 25: Distribution of cube stack successes (S1) over tokens
figures.caption_ko: Figure 25: cube stack 성공(S1)의 토큰별 분포.

figures.caption: Figure 26: Cube stack multi-turn success rate vs. turns. Trials with too few or too many turns have lower success rate. Results are averaged across M1, M2, and M3.
figures.caption_ko: Figure 26: Cube stack multi-turn 성공률 vs 턴 수. 턴이 너무 적거나 많으면 성공률이 낮아진다.

tables.caption: Table 2: LIBERO-PRO performance of OpenVLA, π₀, π₀.₅ and CaP-Agent0 on the libero-object, libero-goal, and libero-spatial benchmarks under initial position perturbations (Pos) and instruction perturbations (Task) averaged across tasks.
tables.caption_ko: Table 2: LIBERO-PRO에서 OpenVLA, π₀, π₀.₅, CaP-Agent0의 libero-object, libero-goal, libero-spatial 벤치마크 성능. 초기 위치 변동(Pos)과 지시 변동(Task) 조건의 태스크 평균.

tables.caption: Table 4: Impact of RL Post-Training in Sim and Real. Comparison of success rates between the base model, our RL post-trained agent, and human experts. Simulation results are averaged over 100 trials per task, while real-world deployment on a Franka Emika robot is evaluated over 25 trials.
tables.caption_ko: Table 4: RL 후학습의 시뮬레이션 및 실제 환경 영향. 기본 모델, RL 후학습 에이전트, human expert 간 성공률 비교. 시뮬레이션은 태스크당 100회, 실제 로봇(Franka Emika)은 25회 시행.
